title: Add a new version of a file to a file-column via API
excerpt:
Hello community, 
I use the web api to change values in multiple columns. It works all fine. 
Now I would like to upload and change images in new file-column. 
The upload works, but I don’f find any way to change/update …

posts.author: sebst (Sebastian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello community,
I use the web api to change values in multiple columns. It works all fine.
Now I would like to upload and change images in new file-column.
The upload works, but I don’f find any way to change/update the image file (with the same Name). My favorite way would be to add a new version of the image, like it is possible, when I open the image file on the webpage and use the button in the top-right corner of the dialog.

Big thanks
Sebastian
